title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has warned about Claude's expanding role in AI development, now handling code writing, review, experiments, and system improvement. OpenAI has issued similar warnings about accelerating frontier AI capabilities and the need for coordinated governance frameworks.
